provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, speed tonic in a slim elegant glass bottle, tall narrow vessel containing pale golden translucent liquid, a delicate feather silhouette etched into the glass surface, thin silver stopper with a pointed finial, the liquid looks light and airy almost weightless inside the bottle, bright golden highlights
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Single tall bottle with feather etching, dark bg. Elegant proportions, good glass material with gold tones. Clean icon.
